network-failed.next: Check network and rerun the current phase command with --resume

package-failed.next: Check package repository availability and pacman sync, then retry with --resume

seed-failed.next: Regenerate seed on macOS and re-import

verify-failed.next: Run installer verification manually or consult docs/known-limitations.md

preflight-failed.next: Resolve preflight errors displayed above and try again

generic-failure.next: Check install logs and rerun the phase command with --resume
